title: Chef Aid Double Edged Stainless Steel Peeler, Ideal for Removing the Peel and Skin from Fruit and Vegetables, Fitted with Easy Store Hanging Loop, Dishwasher Safe, Silver
features: EFFORTLESS PEELING: Effortlessly remove the peel and skin from a variety of fruits and vegetables
DOUBLE-EDGED: Equipped with a double-edged stainless steel peeler to ensure efficient peeling from both directions for simplified prep work, Ideal for Left and Right Handed people
VERSATILE: From apples to potatoes, carrots to cucumbers and many more
HANGING LOOP: The scoop is fitted with a handy hanging loop, meaning this is a perfect space saving option for the kitchen
DISHWASHER SAFE: The Chef Aid Range of Stainless Steel Utensils are Dishwasher safe and can also be hand washed
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
